msg: fix(mobile): anchor touch controls to viewport so iOS/touch movement works
test: fix 5 visual-scene harness bugs so the suite is honest (39/39 green)
fix: import hissQLen into Game.js — missing import crashed update() every frame (black screen)
J3: landing dust, mining sparks, ambient motes, modal fade-in
J2 — Movement feel: variable jump height + accel/friction
J1 — Camera: lerp + look-ahead + deadzone
W3: level-based hot-fluid (lava), contact DOT, water+lava solidification
W2: water render + player interaction (buoyancy, swim, breath/drown)
W1: level-based water cellular automaton (flow & settling)
I3: item juice — rarity glints, stack-add pop, pickup floatT
I2 — Inventory/hotbar drag, split, merge, cancel
specs: enrich I3 (item juice) with rarity tiers, glint cadence, pop curve, shared pickup event
specs: enrich I2 (inventory) with gesture thresholds, merge remainder, no-loss invariants
specs: front-load detailed neutral specs for remaining mechanics (I2/I3/W1-3/J1-3)
ref: restore + expand private source-game reference (feeds cloud agents)
docs: make the loop gate-free (non-blocking milestone markers + one FYI PR)
I1 — pickup magnetism: drops within 4 tiles fly to player
fix(ci): sanitize deploy message with sed (perl env-interp broke the pipe)

ci: deploy source-free public bundle to zigquest-web (private repo stays private)
